meta.summary: RepeatModeler de novo transposable element family discovery and library construction runtime packaged from the official Dfam TETools environment.
meta.description: RepeatModeler de novo transposable element family discovery and library construction runtime packaged from the official Dfam TETools environment.

test: RepeatModeler -version 2>&1 | grep -Fx 'RepeatModeler version 2.0.9' >/dev/null && RepeatMasker -v 2>&1 | grep -Fx 'RepeatMasker version 4.2.4' >/dev/null && rmblastn -version 2>&1 | grep -F 'rmblastn: 2.17.1+' >/dev/null && trf -v 2>&1 | grep -F 'Tandem Repeats Finder, Version 4.09' >/dev/null && test "${BLAST_USAGE_REPORT}" = 'false' && test "${PAGER}" = 'cat'

RepeatModeler -help 2>&1 | grep -F -- '-database' >/dev/null && RepeatModeler -help 2>&1 | grep -F -- '-LTRStruct' >/dev/null && BuildDatabase -help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Format FASTA files for use with RepeatModeler' >/dev/null && RepeatClassifier -help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Classify Repeat Models' >/dev/null

perl -c /opt/RepeatModeler/RepModelConfig.pm && grep -F "'value' => '/opt/FamDB-Dfam-4.0'" /opt/RepeatModeler/RepModelConfig.pm >/dev/null && grep -F "'value' => '/opt/RepeatMasker'" /opt/RepeatModeler/RepModelConfig.pm >/dev/null && grep -F "'value' => '/opt/rmblast/bin'" /opt/RepeatModeler/RepModelConfig.pm >/dev/null && grep -F "'value' => '/opt/LTR_retriever'" /opt/RepeatModeler/RepModelConfig.pm >/dev/null && grep -F "'value' => '/opt/genometools/bin'" /opt/RepeatModeler/RepModelConfig.pm >/dev/null && grep -F "'value' => '/opt/mafft/bin'" /opt/RepeatModeler/RepModelConfig.pm >/dev/null

famdb.py --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'famdb.py' >/dev/null && gt -version 2>&1 | grep -F 'GenomeTools' >/dev/null && mafft --version 2>&1 | grep -F 'v7.471' >/dev/null && LTR_retriever -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'LTR_retriever' >/dev/null && RepeatScout 2>&1 | grep -F 'RepeatScout Version 1.0.7' >/dev/null && cd-hit-est -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'CD-HIT' >/dev/null && faToTwoBit 2>&1 | grep -F 'faToTwoBit' >/dev/null

set -e; tmp=/tmp/taf-repeatmodeler-smoke-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; cd "$tmp"; printf '>seq1
ACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGT
>seq2
TGCATGCATGCATGCATGCATGCATGCATGCA
' > tiny.fa; BuildDatabase -name tiny tiny.fa >/tmp/taf-repeatmodeler-builddb.log 2>&1; test -s tiny.nin; test -s tiny.nsq; test -s tiny.translation; grep -F 'Number of sequences' /tmp/taf-repeatmodeler-builddb.log >/dev/null; rm -rf "$tmp" /tmp/taf-repeatmodeler-builddb.log

upstream.name: RepeatModeler
upstream.license: OSL-2.1; official Dfam TETools runtime bundles dependencies and Dfam/FamDB data under their own notices
upstream.citation: Hubley and Smit, RepeatModeler; Dfam Consortium TETools; Bao and Eddy for RECON; Price et al. for RepeatScout; Benson for TRF; Ou and Jiang for LTR_retriever; Camacho et al. 2009 for BLAST+
